notes: Datasets used by ngo-environment connector dataSources: OWID CSV, World Bank climate/environment indicators, and optional EM-DAT CSV export.

datasets.name: OWID CO2 and Greenhouse Gas Emissions
datasets.notes: Raw CSV used by ngo-environment for CO2, GHG, and land-use-change indicators.

datasets.name: CO2 emissions per capita (metric tons of CO2 equivalent)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/EN.GHG.CO2.PC.CE.AR5.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/EN.GHG.CO2.PC.CE.AR5?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: CO2 emissions total (Mt of CO2 equivalent, AR5)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/EN.GHG.CO2.MT.CE.AR5.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/EN.GHG.CO2.MT.CE.AR5?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: Total greenhouse gas emissions (Mt of CO2 equivalent, AR5)
datasets.notes: World Bank API did not return data for this configured connector indicator. Raw API response is preserved in worldbank/EN.GHG.TOTL.MT.CE.AR5.json. Replacement current World Bank indicator downloaded as EN.GHG.ALL.MT.CE.AR5.

datasets.name: Renewable energy consumption (% of total final energy)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/EG.FEC.RNEW.ZS.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/EG.FEC.RNEW.ZS?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: Renewable electricity output (% of total electricity)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/EG.ELC.RNEW.ZS.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/EG.ELC.RNEW.ZS?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: Forest area (% of land area)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/AG.LND.FRST.ZS.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/AG.LND.FRST.ZS?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: Forest area (sq. km)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/AG.LND.FRST.K2.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/AG.LND.FRST.K2?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: PM2.5 air pollution (micrograms per cubic meter)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/EN.ATM.PM25.MC.M3.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/EN.ATM.PM25.MC.M3?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: Terrestrial and marine protected areas (% of total territorial area)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/ER.PTD.TOTL.ZS.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/ER.PTD.TOTL.ZS?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: Droughts, floods, extreme temperatures (% pop affected, 1990-2009 avg)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/EN.CLC.MDAT.ZS.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/EN.CLC.MDAT.ZS?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: Annual freshwater withdrawals (% of internal resources)
datasets.notes: Raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/ER.H2O.FWTL.ZS.csv. Connector paginates with: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/all/indicator/ER.H2O.FWTL.ZS?format=json&per_page=300&date=2000:2025&page={page}

datasets.name: EM-DAT International Disaster Database
datasets.notes: Manual CSV export required from public.emdat.be; connector expects state/emdat-export.csv.

datasets.name: Total greenhouse gas emissions excluding LULUCF (Mt CO2e)
datasets.notes: Current World Bank replacement for the connector-configured total GHG indicator; raw JSON plus CSV copy: worldbank/EN.GHG.ALL.MT.CE.AR5.csv
